data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_WouldYouTradeIt: Hi, there's this POKéMON that I'm\nlooking for.\pI want a {STR_VAR_1}.\nDo you have one?\pWould you trade it for my {STR_VAR_2}?
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_PleaseBeNiceToMo: Thank you!\pI'll be good to your {STR_VAR_1},\nso please be nice to my {STR_VAR_2}!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_ThatMonIsntAMon: Wait!\nThat POKéMON isn't a {STR_VAR_1}.\pI guess you don't want to trade\nwith me.
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_ChangeYourMindSe: Oh, okay. If you change your mind,\nplease come see me.\pI'll be waiting!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_PromiseToTakeGoo: Thank you for trading with me!\pI really wanted this POKéMON, so\nI promise to take good care of it!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_TradingMemoriesW: Trading POKéMON with others...\pIt's as if you're trading your own\nmemories with other people.
